sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n53645" key="kaswto/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κασωτός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">κασῆς</etym>) <sense id="n53645.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">thick</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐσθῆτες</foreign>, opp. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">στρεπταί</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1321.tlg001:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diog.Oen.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
